original_image_tags: A typed form on aged paper with two hole-punches at the top. The form is titled "INCIDENT SUMMARY SHEET" and contains 23 numbered fields. The responses are typed in a serif font. There is a handwritten annotation "2/0" in the upper right margin.

elements.description: An 'INCIDENT SUMMARY SHEFT' (sic) form with 23 typed items filled out, detailing an observation dated 'Approx. 10 Nov 1945' at '5:00 A.M.' over the Charles River Basin, Boston. A handwritten number '210' is visible in the upper right margin.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual content (an 'INCIDENT SUMMARY SHEET' form with 23 fields and a handwritten annotation in the upper right margin), but one adds specific quoted details about form content (date, time, location) that the other omits, without direct contradiction on verbatim text.
